settings.heading: {{ page.title }}
settings.subtext: Two friends. One vision. Modern jewelry made to shine with you.

settings.heading: Built on Friendship. Designed for You.
settings.paragraph1: Ineezy is a jewelry brand born from the bond of two best friends with a shared dream — to create jewelry that’s not just stylish but actually lasts. We were tired of trendy pieces that faded fast, so we set out to build something better.

settings.title: Waterproof
settings.text: Swim, shower, or dance in the rain - our pieces are designed to last through it all.

settings.title: Anti-Tarnish
settings.text: Our jewelry maintains its shine and brilliance, no matter how often you wear it.

settings.title: Everyday Wear
settings.text: Comfortable, durable, and stylish pieces perfect for your daily adventures.

settings.heading: Why Ineezy?
settings.description: Quality meets style in every piece we create
